text:
BBCviewers have beenleft scratching their headsafter mistakenly believingJohnny Vegashas been commentating on the gymnastics at theOlympics.

The 2024ParisOlympics games are currently underway, with the gymnastics events kicking off a few days ago.

While most of the attention has been focused onthe return of Simone Biles, those watching on at home were left slightly distracted by the voice they’ve been hearing during the national broadcaster’s coverage.

After having represented England over 100 times in various international gymnastic competitions, including at Olympic andCommonwealth Games, Craig Heapwent on to commentate the sport for the BBC.

However, the 51-year-old’s accent has left many wondering if comedian Johnny Vegas, 53, has been moonlighting as a gymnastics expert.

The men, who are both from Lancashire, have been confusing some due to their similar accents.

‘Is Johnny Vegas commenting on the women’s gymnastics?’ Leigh posted on X.

‘Gymnastics commentator sounds disconcertingly like Johnny Vegas,’ Henry shared.

‘Is Johnny Vegas commentating on the parallel bars?’ Clem questioned.

Although many had a case of mistaken identity, it’s not the first time this has happened.

During coverage of the 2020 Tokyo Olympics, BBC viewers were also left wondering if the comedian was pursuing a career change, with one person convinced it was him.

‘Can’t take the women’s gymnastics final seriously with Johnny Vegas co-commentating on the BBC #Tokyo2020,’ they wrote.

While Craig competed in the 2020 Sydney Olympics and also won Gold medals at both the 1998 and 2002 Commonwealth Games, Johnny is best known for his roles on shows including Ideal, Benidorm, Still Open All Hours and as a regular guest panellist on comedy panel shows QI and 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown.

title: BBC viewers convinced comedian is commentating on Olympics gymnastics | Metro News
description: BBC viewers have been scratching their heads after believing Johnny Vegas has been commentating on the gymnastics at the Paris 2024 Olympics
